title: Plan AI
subtitle: Intelligent UML Diagram Generation Platform
description: A full-stack web platform designed to simplify and accelerate the creation of software engineering diagrams (UML). It leverages AI and NLP to understand user requirements written in natural language and dynamically convert them into PlantUML code, then into precise and professional diagrams.
flow: Natural Text → AI Model API → PlantUML Code → PlantUML Server API → Ready Diagram

title: Bluff Arena 🃏
subtitle: Interactive Multiplayer Card Game
description: A strategic online multiplayer card game (inspired by "Cheat"), where players compete to get rid of their cards using deception and quick thinking.
highlights: Pure TypeScript game engine with zero dependencies
Real-time communication and ultra-fast sync with WebSockets and 5-second challenge window
Advanced connection management with Graceful Reconnection (30-second window)
Flexible game modes: JWT + guest play + 3 challenge modes

title: Productivity Launcher
subtitle: Android Productivity Launcher App
description: An alternative Android Launcher that transforms the smartphone from a distraction tool into a focused productivity environment. It redesigns the home screen experience with a triple app classification system and unique graduated protection mechanisms (Friction System).
features: Triple classification system: Home page / Search / Locked apps
Graduated lock system (4 levels): Confirm → Wait 15s → Write reason → Challenges
Profile system: Preset templates (Student, Employee, Freelancer, Focus, Break)
Productivity widget: Pomodoro, daily tasks, habit tracker
achievements: Strict Clean Architecture — easy feature addition
Optimized performance: LRU Cache (↓40% memory) + Lazy loading (↑60% startup time)
Local-first: no cloud dependency, no external tracking
